title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 533.160 - Duty of officer if property not delivered in ten days
text:
533.160.  Duty of officer if property not delivered in ten days. — If such property be not delivered to the officer within ten days after process issued, he shall levy and make the assessed value thereof, the damages and costs, of the property of the party against whom the process issued.
(RSMo 1939 § 1803) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1639; 1919 § 2087; 1909 § 2652
